summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Super Admin dashboard 400 error fix (iteration 5). Verified defensive fallback in resolve_school_id() prevents 400 errors when super_admin requests arrive without X-School-Id header. All critical flows tested: super admin login without runtime errors, backend defensive fallback, school switching, analytics page, and regression testing for all 5 roles.
passed_tests: Backend: Super admin dashboard/summary WITHOUT X-School-Id returns 200 (defensive fallback works)
Backend: Super admin dashboard/summary WITH X-School-Id returns 200
Backend: Super admin analytics WITHOUT X-School-Id returns 200 (defensive fallback works)
Backend: Super admin analytics WITH X-School-Id returns 200
Backend: School admin dashboard/summary works (has school_id in user)
Backend: Accountant dashboard/summary works
Backend: Teacher dashboard/summary works
Backend: Parent dashboard endpoint doesn't crash
Frontend: Super admin login produces NO runtime error overlay
Frontend: Dashboard KPIs render with real numbers (100 students, ₹4,700 today, ₹79,400 monthly)
Frontend: School switcher visible and functional (Ganesh Nagar · GN)
Frontend: School switching works - data refreshes correctly (Ganesh Nagar → Kanpur → Ganesh Nagar)
Frontend: Kanpur school data different from Ganesh Nagar (96 students, ₹4,800 today, ₹83,100 monthly)
Frontend: Analytics page loads without 400 errors
Frontend: Analytics shows correct data (₹3,93,000 received, ₹40,75,800 outstanding, 9% collection rate)
Frontend: School dropdown shows all 3 schools (Ganesh Nagar, Kanpur, Ayar)
Regression: School Admin (GN) login works - no runtime errors, correct route (/)
Regression: Accountant (GN) login works - no runtime errors, correct route (/)
Regression: Teacher (GN) login works - no runtime errors, correct route (/)
Regression: Parent (GN) login works - no runtime errors, correct route (/parent)
Regression: Parent dashboard shows correct data (₹270 balance due, 90% attendance, 3 homework)

critical_fixes_verified: ✅ Super Admin login sequence produces NO runtime error overlay: Tested with fresh localStorage clear, login, 5-second wait - no 'Uncaught runtime errors: Request failed with status code 400' overlay appeared
✅ Backend defensive fallback works: GET /api/dashboard/summary without X-School-Id header returns 200 with data from first school (by code order), not 400
✅ Backend defensive fallback for analytics: GET /api/analytics without X-School-Id header returns 200 with data
✅ X-School-Id header sent by default: Frontend module-level cache (_activeSchoolId) in api.js ensures header is sent on all requests
✅ School switching still works: Dashboard data refreshes correctly when switching between schools (Ganesh Nagar ↔ Kanpur)
✅ Non-super-admin roles see only their assigned school: School admin, accountant, teacher all work correctly with their assigned school_id
✅ Parent login works: Redirects to /parent route, shows correct student data
✅ Full E2E flow for all 5 roles: All roles login successfully without any red error overlays
✅ Analytics page loads without 400s: Previously used same resolve_school_id path, now works with defensive fallback
implementation_details: Backend: auth.py lines 70-96 added _default_school_cache and _read_first_school_id_sync() function
Backend: auth.py lines 98-118 resolve_school_id() now has defensive fallback - if super_admin request has no school scope, falls back to first active school by code order
Frontend: api.js lines 10-19 added module-level cache _activeSchoolId with setActiveSchoolRef/getActiveSchoolRef exports
Frontend: api.js line 26 interceptor reads from _activeSchoolId first, falls back to localStorage
Frontend: SchoolContext.jsx lines 14-17 applyActive() wrapper calls setActiveSchoolRef(id) synchronously alongside setActiveSchoolIdState(id)
Frontend: SchoolContext.jsx lines 36-41 added useEffect to clear active school when user logs out
notes.race_condition_fix: The race condition was caused by SchoolContext writing school_id to localStorage asynchronously via React setState, while the axios interceptor was reading it synchronously. The fix adds a module-level cache that is updated synchronously before any React state update, ensuring the interceptor always has the correct school_id available.
notes.test_coverage: All features from the review request have been tested and verified working correctly. Both backend API defensive fallback and frontend module-level cache are functioning as expected. No runtime errors detected in any flow.
